description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/catalog.json to raise SKU-200's price from 21.50 to 24.00, clearing the 15% margin floor (23.00 minimum against a 20.00 cost). The remaining SKUs (SKU-100, SKU-300) already clear the floor, so check_margin.py exits 0 on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys and zero external tools.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_margin.py: 1 SKU below the margin floor — SKU-200 priced at 21.50 against a floor of 23.00 (cost 20.00, min_margin 15%). Raising SKU-200's price to 24.00 to clear the floor with headroom. Not touching the policy or the checker.
interactions.notes: The fix — check_margin.py now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
